CREATE TABLE foo (id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE bar (id INT, foo_id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE demo_publication (sql_statement VARCHAR(500), timestamp DATETIME);
INSERT INTO demo_publication VALUES ('Initial statement', NOW());
SELECT * FROM foo WHERE id IN (SELECT foo_id FROM bar WHERE value = 'test');
UPDATE foo SET description = ? WHERE id = ?;
DELETE FROM bar WHERE value = ? AND foo_id = ?;
INSERT INTO demo_publication (sql_statement, timestamp) VALUES (repl_text('demo-publication', 'insert into foo values (?, ?)', ?, ?), NOW());
INSERT INTO demo_publication (sql_statement, timestamp) VALUES (repl_text('demo-publication', 'update bar set value = ? where id = ?', ?, ?), NOW());
INSERT INTO demo_publication (sql_statement, timestamp) VALUES (repl_text('demo-publication', 'delete from foo where id = ?', ?), NOW());
